_comment: BLOSSOM — Hua Zhan City (gym 2, Grass) leader intro. A per-leader copy of leader_intro.json (the shared scene cannot carry a name title), reusing Cicada's takehara_leader_intro geometry VERBATIM: the same relative+facingFrame+endBack:7 chaining so gym/engage_hua_zhan_leader still opens the battle from the endBack stage. Grass-type theme: sweet-berry pick / grass break on the pull-up, composter-ready on the zoom hold, then a green happy_villager life-sparkle plus a sustained fall of cherry-blossom PETALS (minecraft:cherry_leaves, four bursts at ticks 40/88/130/165 — from the zoom-in through the farewell) bloom at the push-in, with a lazy bee loop under the side-profile cross. Blossom has NO uuid (she is the disguised groundskeeper transformed in place), so particles fall back to the challenger-facing offset: the happy_villager throw is `^ ^1 ^7`, and the petals are emitted HIGH and WIDE at `^ ^3 ^6-7` (spread ~1.6-1.8, speed 0) so they drift DOWN through the frame around where she stands ~7 blocks ahead. IN-WORLD TUNING NEEDED: air-verify + nudge the ^-offsets and the zoom-keyframe framing at the real Hua Zhan garden arena; the throws are aimed off the challenger's look frame, not the camera rig. endBack 7 MUST match leader_intro so the post-scene battle opens correctly.

cues.command: execute at @s positioned ^ ^3 ^6 run particle minecraft:cherry_leaves ~ ~ ~ 1.6 0.6 1.6 0.0 40 force
execute at @s positioned ^ ^1 ^7 run particle minecraft:happy_villager ~ ~ ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
execute at @s positioned ^ ^3 ^7 run particle minecraft:cherry_leaves ~ ~ ~ 1.8 0.8 1.8 0.0 70 force
execute at @s positioned ^ ^3 ^6 run particle minecraft:cherry_leaves ~ ~ ~ 1.6 0.6 1.6 0.0 45 force
execute at @s positioned ^ ^3 ^6 run particle minecraft:cherry_leaves ~ ~ ~ 1.6 0.5 1.6 0.0 35 force
